channel.title: TruthLens Pro Blog
channel.description: Insights on AI detection, deepfakes, and content authenticity from the TruthLens Pro team.

item.title: How to Detect AI-Generated Writing in 2026
item.description: AI writing tools leave telltale patterns. Learn the markers and cues that reveal machine-generated text, and how TruthLens Pro catches them automatically.

item.title: How AI Generates Deepfake Images
item.description: AI image synthesis has reached photorealistic quality. Learn how GAN and diffusion systems generate deepfakes, and the artifacts they leave behind.

item.title: AI Detection Accuracy: How TruthLens Compares
item.description: We benchmarked TruthLens Pro against leading AI detection tools using 10,000 samples. Results: 97.4% accuracy for text and 94.1% for images.
